public_reputation: Known around Emberforge Outpost through day-to-day work as patrol captain.
manner: Carries public authority with visible readiness, treating uncertainty as something to pin down before it spreads. In Emberforge Outpost, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of patrol captain in and around Emberforge Outpost, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Emberforge Outpost workable through the obligations of patrol captain while managing the immediate pressure of celestial activity on routes, need for caravan coordination.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of patrol captain credible while absorbing the strain created by celestial activity on routes, need for caravan coordination.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Faelar Sunweave is immediately readable as a patrol captain tied to Emberforge Outpost.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Emberforge Outpost: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Faelar Sunweave presents as someone shaped by the duties of a patrol captain and the daily pressures of Emberforge Outpost.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a patrol captain, and proof that strangers will not make Emberforge Outpost harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Faelar Sunweave refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a patrol captain too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can provide official cover, threat briefings, and disciplined response to immediate danger.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Faelar Sunweave adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Faelar Sunweave always knows more about Emberforge Outpost than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a patrol captain in Emberforge Outpost.
